PEN America's Index of School Book Bans lists instances occurring from July 1, 2022 through June 30, 2023, where students' access to books in school libraries and classrooms in the United States was restricted or diminished, for either limited or indefinite periods of time. Some of these bans have since been rescinded and some remain in place. PEN America's definition of school book bans and detailed methodology can be found in the tab below and here.
